deploy.startCommand: /bin/sh -c 'if [ "$BUMBLEBEE_RAILWAY_ROLE" = "api" ]; then exec /app/docker/entrypoint-railway.sh -m bumblebee.main api --host 0.0.0.0 --port "${PORT:-8080}"; elif [ -n "$BUMBLEBEE_ENTITY" ]; then exec /app/docker/entrypoint-railway.sh -m bumblebee.main worker "$BUMBLEBEE_ENTITY"; else echo "Railway: set BUMBLEBEE_RAILWAY_ROLE=api for the API service, or set BUMBLEBEE_ENTITY for the worker." >&2; exit 1; fi'
